1824530.name: Flayl
1824530.description:
Flayl is a Extraction MMO that delivers epic dynamic fights with comedic relief & personality.

Setup your gear, join a raid, fight for your life against up to 200 other players per raid & Kovaak's hostile factions, wildlife, and even the world itself, using weapons, skills/abilities, & physics to your desperate advantage. 

Welcome to Kovaak

An alternate reality parallel universe to earth, that is recovering from a near extinction level bioweapon attack. The life that survived the virus was forever changed & evolved to hyper mutate. Altered at its genetic core, and oftentimes in horrifying ways. Explore the vast lands of Kovaak, as you uncover the road that has led you to this moment. 

  • MMO Foundation - Character & Archetype Progression & Persistence, Guilds, Trading & Economy. Idempotency every step of the way. Server meshing implementation with performance & stability at the forefront of focus. 60hz+ adaptive tick rate servers. Modern & utilizing cutting edge technology at its foundation.

  • Extraction - Player Stash -> Deploy into Raid -> Gather High Value Loot -> Survive Raid -> Extract -> Upgrade Hideout -> Craft Better Gear -> Deploy into Raid -> Get Got -> Lose Better Gear -> Rinse - Repeat

  • Limb Health & Limb Status Effect Systems - Zero out limbs, treat limb based status effects, protect your extremities from fatal injury, or face the need to treat them in raid

  • Open World - Adventure, Explore, Gather, Quest, Visit Trader Hubs, Dungeon Dive, Group up to fight World Bosses, & experience a natural breathing ecosystem that changes dynamically over time

  • Classless Archetype System - Mix & Match archetype trees to make your own unique build. Heal, Damage, Defend, or Support in any number of combination. Utilizing a unique creative & expansive approach for tuning & balancing workflow

  • Fluid Directional Melee Combat System - Intuitive control for swings & skill based parry, block, chambering, feinting, kicking & more

  • Simulated Bullets & Projectile Ballistics with penetration, deflection, with wind, weather, & temporal effects. Utilizes material science while being extremely performant & responsive

  • Unreal Engine 5.7+ - Utilizing Mover & allowing reliable replicated physics based movement without the pitfalls of previous generations of game movement systems

  • Iconic NPC & Story Character Cast bursting with vibes

  • PVP - Loot Drop on death & Player Karma/Reputation Systems. Your actions have consequences, but also sometimes it's fun & profitable to be naughty

  • PVPVE - Play solo, with friends, or with your guild to tackle a wide range of dynamic PVPVE content such as; high value resource hotspots, MMO like dungeons with phase based bosses, objective based events, & fight others to contest potential riches

  • Dynamic Seasons & Weather - Watch massive towering storms form & move across the world in real time. Endure the seasons as the weather changes globally, dredge through snow, rain, sandstorms, & much more. Experience an immersive organic world that constantly keeps you on your toes

  • Dynamic Weather Hazards & Celestial Events - Seek exposure cover from Acid Rain. Run for cover from meteor showers. Find shelter from Tornadoes. Endure harsh extreme temperatures. Brace for the Blood Moon swarms

  • Intuitive Weapon Modification for mostly Firearms

  • Accurate Positional Audio - Custom Audio Engine - Astra Audio Framework - built for precision, accuracy, & total control

  • Spatial VOIP - Hear your enemies loud mouth team chatter from a distance down a tight hallway & plan an ambush. Yell obscenities from behind cover at your enemies, or try to negotiate with them

  • Comedic & Iconic Voice lines - Professionally voiced male & female voice line packs featuring some of the best voice actor talent in the world. No MIC? No problem, use those spicy voice lines!

  • Dungeons / Raids / World Events - Conquer challenging & rewarding dungeon content, coordinate large raids meant for guilds, & participate in potentially cooperative world events against various entities such as corruption spread

  • Trade Routes - Escort & protect valuable cargo for traders between trade hubs. High risk & high reward, you will be a prime target for thieves & pirates looking for that booty. Swiggity swooty, they're coming for your booty

  • Trader Towns (Safezones) - Sell, barter & trade your hard earned booty (not like that you goof) to Vendors, Players, & access the marketplace. Refine resources & craft, or just simply take a load off for a few

  • Gathering, Crafting & Professions - Fight over highly sought after crafting resources & materials to make better equipment, gadgets & weaponry. Craft directly in raid, or alternatively in your hideout on upgraded crafting benches for harder to obtain crafts, and even situationally outside of Trader Towns for more primitive on demand needs

  • Interactive Foliage & Environment - Cut down trees to create a domino effect, move foliage as you pass through it, cause dynamic performant water ripples as you swim on the surface, or setup a Wiley Coyote style boulder trap in a bottleneck in the landscape for your enemies 

  • Optional Story Questlines - Featuring a diverse cast of iconic characters & personalities that you can't help but fall in love with

  • UHD Unique & Modern Stylized Art Style

  • Diverse NPC Factions & Adaptive Native/Non Native Wildlife

  • Dynamic Content Difficulty Scaling

  • Dynamic Group Size based Match Making

  • Secure & Non-Invasive Anti Cheat

  • Cinematic Deferred Replay System (with built in player reporting)

  • Advanced Monitoring Systems for detecting cheating, dupes, exploits, RMT, & more to ensure a fair playing field

  • Extremely Passionate & Experienced Team

  • Cosmetic Only In-Game Shop

  • Exclusive Free Limited Time Early Supporter Skin - Join our Newsletter & get rewarded with the cosmetic Nightwatch Cape
1824530.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
